title: Null objects in Supabase collection query results
symptom: When accessing the query.data array from a Supabase collection, there are numerous null objects present, leading to confusion about the actual data returned.
applies_when: Using Supabase as a data source
Setting a limit on the number of records
not_this_if: Query returns expected data without nulls
root_cause: The presence of null objects in the query.data array is due to how the collection engine in WeWeb handles pagination and data binding. These nulls act as placeholders for records that are not currently loaded or available in the current page context.
fix_steps: Bind the collection directly instead of using collection->data
Ensure pagination settings are correctly configured to limit the number of records displayed
agent_instruction: Bind the collection directly to access only the items from the current page without null placeholders.
